dead_ends.what_was_tried: Custom TryClaim / ReleaseSite / GetClaimant on IWytchWorkSite
dead_ends.why_it_failed: Redundant with SmartObject subsystem claiming. Caused dual-ownership ambiguity — who holds the claim, the interface or the subsystem? Removed 2026-02-27.
dead_ends.alternative_used: SmartObject MarkSlotAsClaimed() / MarkSlotAsFree() exclusively. IWytchWorkSite only defines BeginWork/TickWork/EndWork behavior.

dead_ends.why_it_failed: Deprecated in UE 5.5+. Removed from engine. Causes linker errors.
dead_ends.alternative_used: MarkSlotAsClaimed() / MarkSlotAsFree() — the current UE 5.7 API.

dead_ends.why_it_failed: ActivityRequirements is FGameplayTagQuery, not FGameplayTagContainer. Compile error. Easy to misuse because the name implies container.
dead_ends.alternative_used: FGameplayTagQuery::MakeQuery_MatchAnyTags(TagContainer) to build the query before assigning.

dead_ends.what_was_tried: GetAllActorsWithTag() for worker/workstation discovery in StateTree tasks and conditions
dead_ends.why_it_failed: Tag-based world scan is O(n) over all actors. Does not filter by capability. Does not integrate with SmartObject slot lifecycle. Was a transitional stub only — never the target architecture.
dead_ends.alternative_used: USmartObjectSubsystem::FindSmartObjects() for workstations. Registered worker roster on AIC_Foreman with IWytchCommandable::GetWorkerState() for workers. (Step 2 target)

dead_ends.what_was_tried: Child Blueprint with Event BeginPlay node (even disconnected) — relied on parent BeginPlay running
dead_ends.why_it_failed: A child class with any Event BeginPlay node overrides parent BeginPlay entirely. Parent logic only runs if child explicitly calls Parent: Event BeginPlay. Silently broke StateTree startup.
dead_ends.alternative_used: Ensure child BP either has no BeginPlay node, or explicitly calls Parent: Event BeginPlay as first node.

dead_ends.what_was_tried: BPI_WorkerCommand / BPI_WorkTarget Blueprint interfaces for Foreman-to-worker and worker-to-workstation communication
dead_ends.why_it_failed: Blueprint interfaces cannot be queried from C++ StateTree tasks cleanly. No type safety, no guaranteed implementation. Being replaced by IWytchCommandable (C++) and IWytchWorkSite (C++).
dead_ends.alternative_used: IWytchCommandable C++ UInterface for Foreman→worker. IWytchWorkSite C++ UInterface for worker→workstation.

dead_ends.what_was_tried: Registering GameplayTags at runtime via GameplayTags settings object
dead_ends.why_it_failed: Runtime registration proved unreliable inside active editor sessions; tags may not be recognized consistently by C++/Blueprint usage until restart.
dead_ends.alternative_used: Define all required tags in Config/DefaultGameplayTags.ini before the editor session. After adding new tags to .ini, restart the editor before using them.
